category_sources: source_facts.description says Cot is a Rust web framework; official Cot guide describes it as a batteries-included web framework for Rust.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cot; official cot.rs guide and docs use Cot as the framework name.
docs_sources: Official cot.rs guide is the dedicated documentation surface; docs.rs provides official Rust API reference for the cot crate.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Rust web framework; official guide/API docs describe Cot as batteries-included and Django-inspired with ORM and CLI support.
